name: Talkmon
overview: At Talkmon, ‘Master,’ a well-known master of talk shows, and ‘Monster,’ a talented novice to talk shows, form a team to have a 'talk show battle' with other teams. Discover new talents for the future of Korean variety shows!

trailers.title: TALKMON [티저] 토크 고수 '마스터'와 '몬스터'가 만났다! 너랑 나랑 크로~스 토크몬 1월 커밍순! 180115 EP.1
